positive: A minimalist, highly detailed celestial map print featuring stylized constellations and nebulae. The composition is centrally focused, showcasing intricate, glowing white and deep sapphire blue constellations outlined against a stark, deep matte black void. Interspersed among the stars are abstract, bioluminescent floral elements and gentle, sweeping cosmic dust trails that form elegant silhouettes. The style should be a blend of Art Deco geometry and ethereal, scientific illustration. Lighting must be dramatic and high-contrast, emphasizing the glowing luminosity of the stars and the clean, graphic lines of the constellations. The overall aesthetic should be sophisticated, mysterious, and perfectly designed for apparel printing.
negative: blur, artifacts, noise, text, watermark, signature, cropped, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, realistic photography, cartoon, logo, typography, blurry lines, poorly rendered, grayscale only
